title: tanacetum polycephalum subsp. heterophyllum
intro: Tanacetum polycephalum subsp. heterophyllum, also known as Kresten or Mountain Tansy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Kresten include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of Kresten include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
